prompt: Shift-end reconciliation has two head-scratchers. One: the scanner-stutter dedupe (same seq and same sku on consecutive lines must count once — known hardware quirk) has quietly stopped deduping, so stuttered lines double-count and totals come out high. Two, the one that breaks my brain: the discrepancy report flags PLT-STD-40 with expected=300, scanned=300. Three hundred versus three hundred, flagged as a mismatch! Small orders never do this — the little bin-and-cable picks reconcile clean every day; it's only the big pallet quantities that get reported as different-while-identical. python3 test_reconcile.py reproduces both. Fix reconcile.py and rerun the tests to show it; test_reconcile.py is off-limits.
